description:
You are a security engineer who has just rotated several application-level
    API keys.  
    Your objectives are to 1) extract every “key-rotation” event from yesterday’s
    application log, 2) produce a human-readable report, 3) update the
    application configuration with the new key that management has provided
    (ROTATED_KEY_2023), and 4) leave a forensic audit trail for compliance.

    Environment overview
    --------------------
    1. Log directory: /home/user/logs  
       • The relevant log file is /home/user/logs/app-2023-09-01.log  
       • An existing audit log is /home/user/logs/security_audit.log  

    2. Configuration directory: /home/user/.config/app  
       • File to update: /home/user/.config/app/config.yml  

    3. No /home/user/credential_rotation directory currently exists.

    Desired end-state (what the automated checker will verify)
    -----------------------------------------------------------
    A. Directory creation  
       • /home/user/credential_rotation must exist when you are done.

    B. Regex-filtered rotation report  
       • File path: /home/user/credential_rotation/rotation_report_2023-09-01.log  
       • Required line-by-line format (no surrounding spaces):  
         <timestamp>|<username>|<ip>|<oldKey>  
         Example of ONE valid line:  
         2023-09-01T09:01:11Z|jdoe|10.0.0.5|abc123  
       • The report must contain exactly the key-rotation events
         that appear in /home/user/logs/app-2023-09-01.log.
       • The checker is strict about newlines: every line, including the last,
         must end with a single ASCII newline character (0x0A).

    C. New credentials file  
       • Path: /home/user/credential_rotation/new_credentials.env  
       • Exact contents (including trailing newline):  
         NEW_API_KEY=ROTATED_KEY_2023

    D. Updated application configuration  
       • /home/user/.config/app/config.yml must keep all existing keys but the
         value of apiKey must be replaced with "ROTATED_KEY_2023"
         (the quotes must remain).

    E. Audit-trail entry  
       • Append the literal text below as a single new line at the end of
         /home/user/logs/security_audit.log (including the final newline):  
         KEY ROTATED: ROTATED_KEY_2023

    How to achieve this (conceptual guidance, **not commands**)
    -----------------------------------------------------------
    1. Create /home/user/credential_rotation if it is absent.  
    2. Use a single-pass regex (grep, awk, perl, etc.) that matches the
       “rotateKey” log pattern in the source log file.  
       Pattern specifics in the log:  
       • timestamp (ISO-8601 Zulu)  
       • the literal text “INFO rotateKey”  
       • user=<username>  
       • oldKey=<alphanumeric>  
       • ip=<dotted-decimal IP>  
    3. Capture the four fields (timestamp, username, ip, oldKey) and write them
       to the rotation_report_2023-09-01.log file using the exact pipe
       separator shown in section B.  
    4. Generate or otherwise obtain the string ROTATED_KEY_2023 and place it in
       both new_credentials.env and config.yml (see sections C and D).  
       • Make sure the surrounding YAML structure in config.yml is preserved—only
         the value of apiKey should change.  
    5. Append the compliance line described in section E to the audit log.  
    6. Confirm that:  
       • rotation_report_2023-09-01.log exists and matches the required format  
       • new_credentials.env exists with the correct single line  
       • config.yml shows apiKey: "ROTATED_KEY_2023"  
       • security_audit.log ends with KEY ROTATED: ROTATED_KEY_2023

    Notes & constraints
    -------------------
    • You do NOT have root access; remain within /home/user.  
    • Use only POSIX-compatible utilities available in a minimal Linux
      distribution.  
    • No interactive editors (vim, nano, etc.)—scriptable or one-shot commands
      only.  
    • The checker is case- and whitespace-sensitive; adhere exactly to the
      required output.  
    • Avoid deleting or renaming any existing files.  
    • Feel free to use temporary files or subshells, but they must not be part
      of the final state.

    Success is defined exclusively by matching the file paths and file contents
    enumerated in sections A–E.
truth:
<!--
    Initial filesystem objects (before the agent starts)
    ----------------------------------------------------
    1. /home/user/logs/app-2023-09-01.log
       Contents (exactly, including newlines):

       2023-09-01T08:15:27Z INFO download user=asmith file=document.pdf size=15234 ip=10.0.0.8
       2023-09-01T09:01:11Z INFO rotateKey user=jdoe oldKey=abc123 ip=10.0.0.5
       2023-09-01T09:05:14Z WARN cpu usage high
       2023-09-01T10:22:47Z INFO rotateKey user=asmith oldKey=def456 ip=10.0.0.8
       2023-09-01T11:45:22Z INFO rotateKey user=bwayne oldKey=ghi789 ip=10.0.0.9
       2023-09-01T12:04:55Z INFO logout user=jdoe ip=10.0.0.5

    2. /home/user/logs/security_audit.log
       Contents (single line, ends with newline):
       2023-09-01:Audit start

    3. /home/user/.config/app/config.yml
       Contents (exact spacing and quotes):

       apiEndpoint: "https://api.example.com/v1/"
       apiKey: "abc123"
       timeout: 30


    Expected filesystem objects (after the agent finishes)
    ------------------------------------------------------
    1. /home/user/credential_rotation/rotation_report_2023-09-01.log
       Exact contents (three lines, each ending in newline):

       2023-09-01T09:01:11Z|jdoe|10.0.0.5|abc123
       2023-09-01T10:22:47Z|asmith|10.0.0.8|def456
       2023-09-01T11:45:22Z|bwayne|10.0.0.9|ghi789

    2. /home/user/credential_rotation/new_credentials.env
       Exact contents:
       NEW_API_KEY=ROTATED_KEY_2023

    3. /home/user/.config/app/config.yml
       Final contents:

       apiEndpoint: "https://api.example.com/v1/"
       apiKey: "ROTATED_KEY_2023"
       timeout: 30

    4. /home/user/logs/security_audit.log
       Final contents (two lines, each newline-terminated):

       2023-09-01:Audit start
       KEY ROTATED: ROTATED_KEY_2023
    -->
